name: Black Walnut Layer Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp vanilla or black walnut flavoring
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter with sugar until smooth.
2. Add egg yolks and beat thoroughly.
3. Sift cocoa with cake flour and add alternately to the butter mixture with buttermilk (mixed with baking soda).
4. Add nuts and flavoring; mix thoroughly.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form and fold in last.
6. Pour batter into 3 greased and floured cake pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes or until done.
Filling:
1. Soften 2 sticks butter and beat in 1 pound confectioners' sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla flavoring, and (if needed) enough canned milk to make it of spreading consistency. Mix well.
2. Spread filling between cake layers and on top and sides of the cake.
3. Sprinkle chopped walnuts on top.
